zh.lifeSummary: Isabel Martha Kilconquhar是Adam of Kilconquhar和Margaret Mac Niall的女兒，於1258年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡里克。她和Thomas Randolph至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1358年在所羅門群島斯科特蘭享年100歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabel Martha Kilconquhar是Adam of Kilconquhar和Margaret Mac Niall的女儿，于1258年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾卡里克。她和Thomas Randolph至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1358年在所罗门群岛斯科特蘭享年100岁。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

en.lifeSummary: Isabel Martha Kilconquhar was born in 1258, in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland as the daughter of Adam of Kilconquhar and Margaret Mac Niall. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Thomas Randolph. She died in 1358, in Scotland, Solomon Islands, at the age of 100.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabel Martha Kilconquhar est née en 1258, à Carrick, Ayrshire, Écosse, fille de Adam of Kilconquhar et Margaret Mac Niall. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Thomas Randolph. Elle est décédée en 1358, à Scotland, Îles Salomon, à l’âge de 100 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Isabel Martha Kilconquhar wurde 1258 in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, als Tochter von Adam of Kilconquhar und Margaret Mac Niall geboren. Sie hatte mit Thomas Randolph mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1358 im Alter von 100 Jahren in Scotland, Salomonen.

it.lifeSummary: Isabel Martha Kilconquhar è nata il nel 1258 nel Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland come figlia di Adam of Kilconquhar e Margaret Mac Niall. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Thomas Randolph. Morì nel 1358, nel Scotland, Isole Solomone, all'età di 100 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Martha Kilconquharは1258年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカーリックでAdam of KilconquharとMargaret Mac Niallの娘として生まれた。彼女はThomas Randolphとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1358年にソロモン諸島スコトランドで100歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Martha Kilconquhar(은)는 1258년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 카릭에서 Adam of Kilconquhar(와)과 Margaret Mac Niall의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Thomas Randolph(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1358년 솔로몬제도 스컷랜드에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabel Martha Kilconquhar nasceu em 1258, em Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland filha de Adam of Kilconquhar e Margaret Mac Niall. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Thomas Randolph. Ela faleceu em 1358, em Scotland, Ilhas Salomão, com 100 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabel Martha Kilconquhar родилась в 1258 г. в местности каррикк, аиршир, Шотландия. Её родителей звали Adam of Kilconquhar и Margaret Mac Niall. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Thomas Randolph. Она умерла в 1358 г. в местности скотланд, Соломоновы острова в возрасте 100 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Isabel Martha Kilconquhar nació en 1258, en Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland como hija de Adam of Kilconquhar y Margaret Mac Niall. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Thomas Randolph. Murió en 1358, en Scotland, Islas Salomón, a la edad de 100 años.
